How does it work?

1.Authorization

Log in to our platform using any crypto wallet.


2.Customization

Select the filter you are interested in, select wallet addresses (auto/manual).


3.Running the algorithm

Run our algorithm, which will start picking password phrases.


4.Gaining access

After successful matching, gain access to the wallet.


* Service commission -10%, is paid after successfully found SEED PHRASES of the purse with the balance.

About

Our innovative method allows you to gain access to crypto wallets by matching password phrases. Using our advanced algorithm, you can discover forgotten or abandoned wallets and regain control of them. This is a legal and efficient way to earn money without the cost of expensive equipment and electricity.

Fully automatic process

Our algorithm picks password phrases with high accuracy, increasing the chances of success. We ensure complete confidentiality and security of your data.

World Wide Service

Servicing over 200,000 customers from 100+ countries
